response.original_title: Lost your Kraken Wallet Account Password or Seed Phrase: Solutions-Updated-2026
response.overview: What you need to do next depends entirely ☎️ +1-(864)-336-8850 on whether you have misplaced your login details for the main Kraken exchange or the standalone Kraken Wallet (which is self-custodial).  To get Kraken customer support, first contact ☎️ +1-(864)-336-8850 the official support team of Kraken platform, wallet, or exchange available on its official website or app. Kraken offer help via support tickets, live chat, email, phone ☎️ +1-(864)-336-8850, or help centers. Before reaching out ☎️ +1-(864)-336-8850, gather relevant details such as your account email, transaction ID, wallet address, and a description of the issue.  For security, only use Kraken official support channels ☎️ +1-(864)-336-8850 and never share your password, recovery phrase, private keys, or authentication codes with anyone claiming to provide support.
